creator: foxfair@mail.progolf2.com.tw
text:
Some typos in doc/FAQ/install.sgml : ==== diff -Nru install.sgml install.sgm l.org --- install.sgml Sat Jan 2 22:33:16 1999 +++ install.sgml.org Sat Jan 2 22:25:59 1999 @@ -146,7 +146,7 @@ Windows 95 killed my boot manager! How do I get it back? -

You can reinstall the boot manager of FreeBSD comes with in one of +

You can reinstall the boot manager FreeBSD comes with in one of two ways: @@ -187,7 +187,7 @@

If you're seeing things like the machine grinding to a halt or spontaneously rebooting when you try to boot the install floppy, - here are three questions to ask yourself: + here are three questions to ask yourself:- Did you use a new, freshly-formatted, error-free floppy == And the following is some fragmented coincidence of FAQ format : install.sgml line 260:

Thats all! Please read also the manpages lp(4) and lpt(4). Shouldn't here use a label to refer cgi code like : or something ? :-) Fix: If you think it is necessary, just fix it. How-To-Repeat: Everyone has FAQ document, go for it.
